response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song 1 as 'Honto no Watashi' performed by Kazama Iroha. 2. Identified song 2 as 'Anastasis Girl' performed by Kazama Iroha feat. Laplus Darkness, with lyrics/music credited to Nanako Ashida. 3. Attempted to search for lyrics using the tool; found general information but not full official lyrics text, hence leaving fields as null in JSON as per instructions if not found.
response.global_summary: A video showcasing two musical performances by Kazama Iroha, with Laplus Darkness joining for the second song, at the #SSholoX4thAnniversary event.

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha performs the song 'Honto no Watashi' on stage.
Kazama Iroha and Laplus Darkness perform 'Anastasis Girl'. The song credits are shown on screen.
